emergency_definition: total system failure in extreme weather
emergency_fallback: we'll call back within 30 minutes and to call 911 if it's a life safety issue
non_emergency_routing_rules: take a message with name, number, and brief description, and call back next business day

call_transfer_rules.retries: try Dave Kowalski, then Linda Torres
call_transfer_rules.if_transfer_fails: tell caller we'll call back within 30 minutes and to call 911 if it's a life safety issue

integration_constraints: don't create jobs for commercial refrigeration clients in ServiceTitan
after_hours_flow_summary: emergency calls are routed to on-call tech, non-emergency calls are messaged and returned next business day
notes: don't promise specific arrival times, confirm caller's name and callback number before transferring or ending the call
